title: Store, hash, and version agreement inputs

environment.os: Windows local; GitHub Actions pending on Ubuntu and Windows

commands.name: Missing agreement source primitives
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/agreement-intake.test.ts --project property tests/property/agreement-intake.property.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: Both suites failed to import the not-yet-implemented agreement-intake module and zero tests ran

commands.name: Undefined immutable agreement browser behavior
commands.expectedFailure: All shared setup steps passed while three AGR-01 scenarios and fifteen agreement behavior steps were undefined

commands.name: Missing agreement authorization permission
commands.expectedFailure: All four service scenarios reached a Zod permission failure because AGREEMENT_UPLOAD was absent from the server authorization matrix

commands.name: Missing signed multipart routes
commands.expectedFailure: The route suite could not import the not-yet-created agreement upload and source endpoints

commands.name: Exact-byte examples and mutation property
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/agreement-intake.test.ts --project property tests/property/agreement-intake.property.test.ts

commands.name: PostgreSQL, PDF, permissions, and immutable storage proof
Signed multipart upload, list, and exact source routes
commands.command: pnpm --filter @pactwire/core build && pnpm exec vitest run --project integration apps/web/tests/integration/agreement-intake-routes.test.ts

commands.name: Object store accepted a mismatched content address
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/agreement-intake.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: The in-memory object store resolved a write whose key named a different SHA instead of rejecting the bytes

commands.name: Filesystem read returned tampered at-rest bytes
commands.expectedFailure: The filesystem adapter returned deliberately overwritten bytes instead of rejecting the key-to-content mismatch

commands.name: Shared schema, migration, and prior fixture reconciliation
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project integration tests/integration/domain-migrations.test.ts tests/integration/synthetic-data.test.ts tests/integration/test-authorization.test.ts --project unit tests/unit/domain-schemas.test.ts

commands.name: Evidence harness rejected unbound new tests
commands.command: pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:property && pnpm test:integration
commands.expectedFailure: All product tests passed, while the evidence harness identified the five new AGR-01 test and scenario files as orphaned before this manifest existed

commands.name: Ubuntu CI exposed mixed production-build and development-server state
commands.command: GitHub Actions run 29715960381, Verify on ubuntu-latest
commands.expectedFailure: After pnpm build, the BDD harness launched next dev from the same .next tree; Ubuntu reported a canceled agreement download followed by stale 404 responses and DOM timeouts while Windows passed

commands.name: Missing CI-safe BDD server-mode contract
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/bdd-server-mode.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: All three mode-selection examples failed because the not-yet-implemented resolver script was absent

commands.name: CI-safe BDD server-mode contract
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/bdd-server-mode.test.ts

commands.name: Completion gate rejected an over-specific test environment type
commands.expectedFailure: TypeScript rejected partial environment overrides typed as NodeJS.ProcessEnv because this Next.js type environment requires NODE_ENV

scenarios.scenario: A two-page text agreement becomes a verifiable immutable version
Duplicate bytes are reused and changed bytes create a new version
A malformed PDF is rejected before any version or object is stored

visualEvidence.rationale: Production screenshots will be captured and source-bound after the implementation commit exists.

proofs.description: Exact-byte hash, page map, malformed input, and content-address examples
CI production-server default, local development default, and explicit override regression
Seeded exact-replay and arbitrary-position one-byte mutation property
PostgreSQL, filesystem, text, PDF, duplicate, immutable, corruption, audit, and permission proof
Signed multipart upload, forged actor, malformed source, list, and exact download HTTP proof
Verifiable source, duplicate and changed bytes, and blocked malformed PDF journeys
Playwright metadata, page-hash, download-hash, immutability, error, and visual assertions
Bounded extraction, storage adapters, repositories, authorization, versioning, and read verification
Content-address, source metadata, page map, uploader, unique hash, and immutable version constraints
Direct-language upload, immutable version metadata, original download, and page source viewer
Deterministic CI production-server selection that prevents mixed Next.js build and development state
Curated AGR-01 red/green record, exact-byte claim, and explicit limitations

findings: Final production visual sanitization review is pending source-bound capture.

knownLimitations: Page extraction reads embedded PDF text; image-only scanned PDFs are rejected because OCR is not part of AGR-01.
Extracted page text and hashes verify source locations but do not interpret legal meaning; human confirmation belongs to AGR-03.
Input is bounded to 10 MB, 500 pages, and two million extracted characters.
The browser fixture uses ephemeral in-memory storage; production deployment wiring for the PostgreSQL and filesystem adapters remains a release task.
